channel.title: Discover - Bluesky Feed
channel.description: Trending content from your personal network

item.title: 【お知らせ】 2026年7月31日(金)19時～ 積読読書会を開催します！ 1時間、静かに本を読んで、本好きとゆるくつな…
item.author: 書肆喫茶mori〜海外コミックスのブックカフェ (@bookcafemori.bsky.social)
item.description:
【お知らせ】
2026年7月31日(金)19時～
積読読書会を開催します！
1時間、静かに本を読んで、本好きとゆるくつながる会です。

日時：2026年7月31日(金)19時～
参加費：1000円（飲み物＋軽食つき）

ご参加希望は店主までお知らせください。
item.content:encoded:
【お知らせ】
2026年7月31日(金)19時～
積読読書会を開催します！
1時間、静かに本を読んで、本好きとゆるくつながる会です。

日時：2026年7月31日(金)19時～
参加費：1000円（飲み物＋軽食つき）

ご参加希望は店主までお知らせください。

item.title: Banger OST time! This is one of the stage themes in Fire Emb…
item.author: Chris Monka (@chrismonka.bsky.social)
item.description: Banger OST time! This is one of the stage themes in Fire Emblem Warriors: Three Hopes! This track goes crazy! The guitar is absolutely shredding, the drums are bumping, and the trumpets add a hopeful sound to the track! My favorite is the organ, it has an incredible sound! It's an awesome track!
item.content:encoded: Banger OST time! This is one of the stage themes in Fire Emblem Warriors: Three Hopes! This track goes crazy! The guitar is absolutely shredding, the drums are bumping, and the trumpets add a hopeful sound to the track! My favorite is the organ, it has an incredible sound! It's an awesome track!

item.title: Claude Fable 5、無料お試し期間がまさかの再延長🎉 Anthropicが有料プラン内での最上位モデル無料…
item.author: 胡田@Microsoft MVP(2014~)&MCT / Masahiko Ebisuda (@ebibibibibibi.bsky.social)
item.description:
Claude Fable 5、無料お試し期間がまさかの再延長🎉

Anthropicが有料プラン内での最上位モデル無料提供を7月19日まで延長。
週次利用上限の50%までなら、追加課金なしでそのまま使えます。

なぜ延長したのか、続きはこちら👇
https://www.ebisuda.net/tech/2026/07/13/anthropicclaude-fable-5719-claude-fable-5-stays-free-for-paid-users-until-july-1/

#TechNews #Anthropic
item.content:encoded:
Claude Fable 5、無料お試し期間がまさかの再延長🎉

Anthropicが有料プラン内での最上位モデル無料提供を7月19日まで延長。
週次利用上限の50%までなら、追加課金なしでそのまま使えます。

なぜ延長したのか、続きはこちら👇
https://www.ebisuda.net/tech/2026/07/13/anthropicclaude-fable-5719-claude-fable-5-stays-free-for-paid-users-until-july-1/

#TechNews #Anthropic

item.title: Canadian Mi’kmaw used canoe for transportation and learned t…
item.author: Spudislander45 🇨🇦❤️🌎💪🫡 (@spudislander45.bsky.social)
item.description:
Canadian Mi’kmaw used canoe for transportation and learned that using spruce roots and eel grass tied to their canoe who deter sharks.

#Canada #AtlanticCanadian #AtlanticOcean #Sharks
item.content:encoded:
Canadian Mi’kmaw used canoe for transportation and learned that using spruce roots and eel grass tied to their canoe who deter sharks.

#Canada #AtlanticCanadian #AtlanticOcean #Sharks

item.title: @hcrichardson.bsky.social turned decades of studying democra…
item.author: 💙🏳️‍🌈 Goldie (aka Kh’ymm) 🏳️‍🌈💙 (@thegoldfishmind.bsky.social)
item.description:
@hcrichardson.bsky.social turned decades of studying democracy into a nightly act of devotion, writing alone past midnight, no sponsors, no noise, just truth and care.

She’s given millions a place to breathe, to understand, to feel less alone. Grateful for her light in the dark.

TYSM HCR!

#Pinks
item.content:encoded:
@hcrichardson.bsky.social turned decades of studying democracy into a nightly act of devotion, writing alone past midnight, no sponsors, no noise, just truth and care.

She’s given millions a place to breathe, to understand, to feel less alone. Grateful for her light in the dark.

TYSM HCR!

#Pinks

item.title: #ぼっち・ざ・ろっく 喜多郁代(ダーウィンが喜多ver.) 最近ぼざろの絵が多くなってますね。。 来週は出来れば違う二次…

そして色塗りペン入れ間に合わなかったw

item.title: Happy Cirno Sunday! The current vibe is thinking about the P…
item.author: Chris Monka (@chrismonka.bsky.social)
item.description: Happy Cirno Sunday! The current vibe is thinking about the Pop Team Epic anime! ngl Pop Team Epic was so amazing 🥹 the first season is one of the funniest things I've ever seen, and the opening was beautiful, it was immaculate 😭 I hope you have a wonderful day, I send love and positivity your way 💛☺️
item.content:encoded: Happy Cirno Sunday! The current vibe is thinking about the Pop Team Epic anime! ngl Pop Team Epic was so amazing 🥹 the first season is one of the funniest things I've ever seen, and the opening was beautiful, it was immaculate 😭 I hope you have a wonderful day, I send love and positivity your way 💛☺️

item.title: #🔖テクノロジー はてブのコメントで警告もらった 死ねだの死んだほうがいいだの殺したいだの書いてたら、 「おめー、ガ…
item.author: はてなブックマーク 人気エントリー (@hatena-bookmark.bsky.social)
item.description:
#🔖テクノロジー
はてブのコメントで警告もらった

死ねだの死んだほうがいいだの殺したいだの書いてたら、 「おめー、ガイドライン違反のコメント多すぎ、次やったら無警告強制でアカウント非公開にするからな、これが最後の警告」 というお知らせをはてなからもらったのだが、 「ほんとならとっくに非公開処置してるんだけど、おめえは長年はてな使ってっからちょっとだ...
item.content:encoded:
#🔖テクノロジー
はてブのコメントで警告もらった

死ねだの死んだほうがいいだの殺したいだの書いてたら、 「おめー、ガイドライン違反のコメント多すぎ、次やったら無警告強制でアカウント非公開にするからな、これが最後の警告」 というお知らせをはてなからもらったのだが、 「ほんとならとっくに非公開処置してるんだけど、おめえは長年はてな使ってっからちょっとだ...

item.title: "ShoreFreakのヘビロテ"033 Cutemen「RELAX」 youtu.be/jZavpzMosyk?.…
item.author: ShoreFreak (@shorefreak.bsky.social)
item.description:
"ShoreFreakのヘビロテ"033

Cutemen「RELAX」

youtu.be/jZavpzMosyk?...

CMJKとPicorinのユニット「Cutemen」です
アルバム「COVERS & MELLOW TUNES」からです
CMJKは電気グルーヴやアイドルグループの楽曲提供でも有名ですね

英国のバンド「Frankie Goes To Hollywood」のカバーです
本家の曲は詞の内容やMVの過激さからBBC、NHKなどでは確か放送禁止になってます

原曲よりもBPMがかなり速く、”ハードコアテクノ”なアレンジ
かなり細かくシンセの音色が切り替わっていきます
item.content:encoded:
"ShoreFreakのヘビロテ"033

Cutemen「RELAX」

youtu.be/jZavpzMosyk?...

CMJKとPicorinのユニット「Cutemen」です
アルバム「COVERS & MELLOW TUNES」からです
CMJKは電気グルーヴやアイドルグループの楽曲提供でも有名ですね

英国のバンド「Frankie Goes To Hollywood」のカバーです
本家の曲は詞の内容やMVの過激さからBBC、NHKなどでは確か放送禁止になってます

原曲よりもBPMがかなり速く、”ハードコアテクノ”なアレンジ
かなり細かくシンセの音色が切り替わっていきます

item.title: More than two dozen people were killed when a fire broke out…
item.author: The New York Times (@nytimes.com)
item.description: More than two dozen people were killed when a fire broke out at a bar in Thailand’s capital, Bangkok, late Sunday night, spreading quickly and apparently sending patrons fleeing into the bathrooms at the back of the venue, where they died, officials said.
item.content:encoded: More than two dozen people were killed when a fire broke out at a bar in Thailand’s capital, Bangkok, late Sunday night, spreading quickly and apparently sending patrons fleeing into the bathrooms at the back of the venue, where they died, officials said.

item.title: 【台風情報】 7月13日(月)9時現在、台風9号(バービー)は中国大陸を北上しています。 今後は徐々に進路を北東に変え、…
item.author: ウェザーニュース (@weathernews.jp)
item.description:
【台風情報】
7月13日(月)9時現在、台風9号(バービー)は中国大陸を北上しています。
今後は徐々に進路を北東に変え、温帯低気圧に変わりながら日本海に進む予想となっています。

北日本はこの低気圧からのびる前線の影響で、強雨や大雨となるおそれがあります。
weathernews.jp/news/202607/...
item.content:encoded:
【台風情報】
7月13日(月)9時現在、台風9号(バービー)は中国大陸を北上しています。
今後は徐々に進路を北東に変え、温帯低気圧に変わりながら日本海に進む予想となっています。

北日本はこの低気圧からのびる前線の影響で、強雨や大雨となるおそれがあります。
weathernews.jp/news/202607/...

item.title: Senator Lindsey Graham’s death leaves Ukraine without its mo…
item.author: The New York Times (@nytimes.com)
item.description: Senator Lindsey Graham’s death leaves Ukraine without its most influential champion inside President Trump’s political orbit. He was one of the few lawmakers who had both an unwavering belief in a muscular American role abroad and a direct line to the president.
item.content:encoded: Senator Lindsey Graham’s death leaves Ukraine without its most influential champion inside President Trump’s political orbit. He was one of the few lawmakers who had both an unwavering belief in a muscular American role abroad and a direct line to the president.

item.author: Mike Henry (@onlyveesaz.bsky.social)
item.description: The Sonoran Desert is the wettest desert on planet Earth. The rains bring what locals commonly refer to our “second Spring.” 🌵🌥️ 🏜️
item.content:encoded: The Sonoran Desert is the wettest desert on planet Earth. The rains bring what locals commonly refer to our “second Spring.” 🌵🌥️ 🏜️

item.title: Erling Haaland and the rest of the Norwegian men's team are …
item.author: Max B 💙 🔶 🇺🇦 🇬🇧 🇪🇺 (@maxbrockbank.com)
item.description:
Erling Haaland and the rest of the Norwegian men's team are paid the same as the women's team.

In 2017, they took a voluntary pay cut to allow the women's pay to be increased.

The move came from the players' union, not management.
item.content:encoded:
Erling Haaland and the rest of the Norwegian men's team are paid the same as the women's team.

In 2017, they took a voluntary pay cut to allow the women's pay to be increased.

The move came from the players' union, not management.

item.title: In 1997, a court ruled New York violated its own welfare law…
item.author: ProPublica (@propublica.org)
item.description:
In 1997, a court ruled New York violated its own welfare laws by offering too small an allowance to put toward rent, leaving poor families with children at risk of homelessness.

A new lawsuit argues that three decades later, that’s still happening.

w/ @nysfocus.com
item.content:encoded:
In 1997, a court ruled New York violated its own welfare laws by offering too small an allowance to put toward rent, leaving poor families with children at risk of homelessness.

A new lawsuit argues that three decades later, that’s still happening.

w/ @nysfocus.com

item.title: Over the last decade, the court—led by Chief Justice John Ro…
item.author: Mother Jones (@motherjones.com)
item.description:
Over the last decade, the court—led by Chief Justice John Roberts—has increasingly relied on a fast-track way of making decisions that was once rarely used.

It’s known as the shadow docket.
item.content:encoded:
Over the last decade, the court—led by Chief Justice John Roberts—has increasingly relied on a fast-track way of making decisions that was once rarely used.

It’s known as the shadow docket.

item.title: The office of Sen. Lindsey Graham (R-South Carolina) said pr…
item.author: The Washington Post (@washingtonpost.com)
item.description:
The office of Sen. Lindsey Graham (R-South Carolina) said preliminary findings from the medical examiner's office found that Graham suffered from an aortic dissection, in which a tear occurs in the inner layer of the main artery.

Read more here: wapo.st/4y8CdCe
item.content:encoded:
The office of Sen. Lindsey Graham (R-South Carolina) said preliminary findings from the medical examiner's office found that Graham suffered from an aortic dissection, in which a tear occurs in the inner layer of the main artery.

Read more here: wapo.st/4y8CdCe

item.content:encoded: Someone went though a great deal of trouble to get a beautiful portrait of this cat. ❤️ Photo from my collection, no date/info.

item.title: Castlegar

item.title: California -- “The facts are clear. This groundwater mining …
item.author: Watchdog Progressive (@watchdogprg.bsky.social)
item.description: California -- “The facts are clear. This groundwater mining proposal would drain the desert and rob the Mojave of its rare springs and wildlife habitat."—NPCA's Chance Wilcox, California Desert Associate Director. www.npca.org/articles/114...
item.content:encoded: California -- “The facts are clear. This groundwater mining proposal would drain the desert and rob the Mojave of its rare springs and wildlife habitat."—NPCA's Chance Wilcox, California Desert Associate Director. www.npca.org/articles/114...

item.title: Are you worried you’re getting fleeced by your 401(k) plan? …
item.author: ProPublica (@propublica.org)
item.description:
Are you worried you’re getting fleeced by your 401(k) plan?

ProPublica is investigating the industry and wants to hear from you. Here's how you can help us report 👇
item.content:encoded:

item.title: 👋 wasn’t going to post today as it’s been a tough week but …
item.author: Elke🇨🇦 (@elkep.bsky.social)
item.description: 👋 wasn’t going to post today as it’s been a tough week but I’ve just regained a crumb of hope. Have an excellent afternoon!
item.content:encoded: 👋 wasn’t going to post today as it’s been a tough week but I’ve just regained a crumb of hope. Have an excellent afternoon!
